findings.title: Signal has significant reference plane gap
findings.description: Net /ITERM_SET has 73% reference plane coverage over 18.7mm of routing. Return current must detour around the gap, creating a loop antenna.
findings.recommendation: Route this signal to avoid ground plane gaps, or fill the void. If a split is intentional, add a bridge capacitor across the gap.
findings.summary: Signal has significant reference plane gap

findings.title: Decoupling cap moderately far from U4
findings.description: Nearest decoupling cap to U4 (TPS61023DRLR) is 6.5mm away. Recommended: <3mm for best high-frequency performance.
findings.recommendation: Move decoupling cap closer to U4 power pins if layout permits.
findings.summary: Decoupling cap moderately far from U4

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J2
findings.description: Connector J2 (LS027B7DH01 FPC) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J2. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.
findings.summary: No EMC filtering near J2

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J3
findings.description: Connector J3 (microSD push-push) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J3. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.
findings.summary: No EMC filtering near J3

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J6
findings.description: Connector J6 (Encoder daughterboard) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J6. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.
findings.summary: No EMC filtering near J6

findings.title: Insufficient ground pins on J6
findings.description: J6 (Encoder daughterboard) has 1 ground pin(s) for 5 signal pins. Recommended: at least 2 ground pins for adequate return current path and cable shielding.
findings.recommendation: Ensure J6 has sufficient ground pins. For high-speed interfaces, ground pins should be distributed among signal pins, not grouped at one end.
findings.summary: Insufficient ground pins on J6

findings.title: Clock /LCD_SCLK on outer layer
findings.description: Clock net /LCD_SCLK is 67% routed on outer layers (microstrip). Inner stripline layers provide better shielding from radiation.
findings.recommendation: Route clock signals on inner layers (stripline) when possible.
findings.summary: Clock /LCD_SCLK on outer layer

findings.title: Clock /I2S_BCLK on outer layer
findings.description: Clock net /I2S_BCLK is 100% routed on outer layers (microstrip). Inner stripline layers provide better shielding from radiation.
findings.recommendation: Route clock signals on inner layers (stripline) when possible.
findings.summary: Clock /I2S_BCLK on outer layer

findings.title: Clock /PDM_CLK on outer layer
findings.description: Clock net /PDM_CLK is 67% routed on outer layers (microstrip). Inner stripline layers provide better shielding from radiation.
findings.recommendation: Route clock signals on inner layers (stripline) when possible.
findings.summary: Clock /PDM_CLK on outer layer

findings.title: Long clock trace: /PDM_CLK
findings.description: Clock net /PDM_CLK is 109mm long. Long clock traces act as antennas and radiate harmonics more effectively.
findings.recommendation: Minimize clock trace length. Place clock source close to destination.
findings.summary: Long clock trace: /PDM_CLK

findings.title: Clock /I2S_LRCLK on outer layer
findings.description: Clock net /I2S_LRCLK is 100% routed on outer layers (microstrip). Inner stripline layers provide better shielding from radiation.
findings.recommendation: Route clock signals on inner layers (stripline) when possible.
findings.summary: Clock /I2S_LRCLK on outer layer

findings.title: Long clock trace: /I2S_LRCLK
findings.description: Clock net /I2S_LRCLK is 102mm long. Long clock traces act as antennas and radiate harmonics more effectively.
findings.recommendation: Minimize clock trace length. Place clock source close to destination.
findings.summary: Long clock trace: /I2S_LRCLK

findings.title: Clock /LCD_SCLK routed near connector J2
findings.description: Clock net /LCD_SCLK passes within 1.5mm of connector J2. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /LCD_SCLK away from J2, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /LCD_SCLK routed near connector J2

findings.title: Clock /LCD_SCLK routed near connector J6
findings.description: Clock net /LCD_SCLK passes within 9.8mm of connector J6. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /LCD_SCLK away from J6, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /LCD_SCLK routed near connector J6

findings.title: Clock /SD_CLK routed near connector J3
findings.description: Clock net /SD_CLK passes within 8.4mm of connector J3. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /SD_CLK away from J3, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /SD_CLK routed near connector J3

findings.title: Clock /SD_CLK routed near connector J6
findings.description: Clock net /SD_CLK passes within 1.7mm of connector J6. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /SD_CLK away from J6, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /SD_CLK routed near connector J6

findings.title: Clock /PDM_CLK routed near connector J6
findings.description: Clock net /PDM_CLK passes within 8.4mm of connector J6. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /PDM_CLK away from J6, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /PDM_CLK routed near connector J6

findings.title: Clock /I2S_LRCLK routed near connector J6
findings.description: Clock net /I2S_LRCLK passes within 4.5mm of connector J6. Clock harmonics can couple to attached cables via proximity, increasing radiated emissions.
findings.recommendation: Route /I2S_LRCLK away from J6, or add ground guard traces between the clock and connector.
findings.summary: Clock /I2S_LRCLK routed near connector J6

findings.title: Board cavity resonance frequencies
findings.description: Board (116×64mm, εr=4.4) cavity resonances: (1,0) at 616 MHz; (0,1) at 1117 MHz; (2,0) at 1232 MHz; (1,1) at 1275 MHz; (2,1) at 1663 MHz. PDN impedance spikes at these frequencies. Ensure adequate decoupling at and around these frequencies.
findings.recommendation: Add decoupling capacitors with SRF near these frequencies.
findings.summary: Board cavity resonance frequencies

findings.title: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /AMP_EN
findings.description: Net /AMP_EN has 4 layer transition(s) across B.Cu, F.Cu, In2.Cu. 4 transition(s) have no ground stitching via within 1.0mm. The return current must find an alternate path, creating a loop antenna.
findings.recommendation: Add a ground stitching via within 1.0mm of each signal via. Place the ground via adjacent to the signal via on the same pad cluster.
findings.summary: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /AMP_EN

findings.title: 21+ nets missing stitching vias (truncated)
findings.description: More than 20 nets have layer transitions without nearby ground stitching vias. Review via placement board-wide.
findings.recommendation: Add ground stitching vias at all signal layer transitions.
findings.summary: 21+ nets missing stitching vias (truncated)

findings.title: Single ground via near ESD device U8
findings.description: U8 (esd_ic) has 1 ground via within 3mm. Multiple parallel vias reduce ground inductance. Two vias halve the inductance (~0.5nH → ~0.25nH).
findings.recommendation: Add a second ground via near U8 for lower inductance.
findings.summary: Single ground via near ESD device U8

findings.title: U3 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band
findings.description: U3 (TPS63070RNMR) switching at 2.4 MHz has 24 harmonics in the 30-88 MHz band (harmonics 13-36). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U3. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U3 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band

findings.title: U3 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band
findings.description: U3 (TPS63070RNMR) switching at 2.4 MHz has 54 harmonics in the 88-216 MHz band (harmonics 37-90). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U3. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U3 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band

findings.title: U3 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band
findings.description: U3 (TPS63070RNMR) switching at 2.4 MHz has 311 harmonics in the 216-960 MHz band (harmonics 90-400). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U3. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U3 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band

findings.title: U4 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band
findings.description: U4 (TPS61023DRLR) switching at 1.0 MHz has 59 harmonics in the 30-88 MHz band (harmonics 30-88). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U4. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U4 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band

findings.title: U4 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band
findings.description: U4 (TPS61023DRLR) switching at 1.0 MHz has 129 harmonics in the 88-216 MHz band (harmonics 88-216). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U4. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U4 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band

findings.title: U4 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band
findings.description: U4 (TPS61023DRLR) switching at 1.0 MHz has 745 harmonics in the 216-960 MHz band (harmonics 216-960). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U4. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.
findings.summary: U4 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band

findings.title: U3 harmonic envelope
findings.description: U3 (TPS63070RNMR) switching at 2.40 MHz, duty ≈50%. Harmonic envelope: flat to 1.5 MHz, -20 dB/dec to 32 MHz, -40 dB/dec above. Harmonics extend into FCC test range starting at 12th harmonic. SPICE FFT: h1=138dBµV (envelope: 138), h2=-138dBµV (envelope: -187), h3=128dBµV (envelope: 128).
findings.recommendation: Minimize the hot loop area (input cap → high-side switch → inductor → low-side switch → input cap). Every halving of loop area reduces emissions by 6 dB.
findings.summary: U3 harmonic envelope

findings.title: U4 harmonic envelope
findings.description: U4 (TPS61023DRLR) switching at 1.00 MHz, duty ≈50%. Harmonic envelope: flat to 0.6 MHz, -20 dB/dec to 32 MHz, -40 dB/dec above. Harmonics extend into FCC test range starting at 30th harmonic. SPICE FFT: h1=138dBµV (envelope: 138), h2=61dBµV (envelope: -187), h3=128dBµV (envelope: 128).
findings.recommendation: Minimize the hot loop area (input cap → high-side switch → inductor → low-side switch → input cap). Every halving of loop area reduces emissions by 6 dB.
findings.summary: U4 harmonic envelope

findings.title: Ferrite FB1 near switching regulator U4
findings.description: FB1 (600R@100MHz) is 4.5mm from switching regulator U4. Ferrite permeability decreases with temperature — if the regulator runs hot, the ferrite impedance may drop 30-50% above 85°C, reducing filtering.
findings.recommendation: Verify ferrite bead thermal rating. Consider relocating away from heat source or using a higher-temperature-rated ferrite.
findings.summary: Ferrite FB1 near switching regulator U4

coverage_matrix.note: Design rule checks identify common radiation sources. Cannot predict absolute emission levels.
Switching harmonic analysis and decoupling checks. EMI filter verification not yet implemented.
Checks for ESD/TVS presence near connectors. Does not verify protection path routing or clamping voltage.
EFT/burst immunity requires lab testing. Input filtering checks (DC-001, IO-001) provide indirect coverage.
Surge immunity requires lab testing. TVS/MOV placement checks provide indirect coverage.

top_issues.title: Signal has significant reference plane gap
top_issues.description: Net /ITERM_SET has 73% reference plane coverage over 18.7mm of routing. Return current must detour around the gap, creating a loop antenna.
top_issues.recommendation: Route this signal to avoid ground plane gaps, or fill the void. If a split is intentional, add a bridge capacitor across the gap.

top_issues.title: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /I2S_LRCLK
top_issues.description: Net /I2S_LRCLK has 2 layer transition(s) across B.Cu, F.Cu. 2 transition(s) have no ground stitching via within 1.0mm. The return current must find an alternate path, creating a loop antenna.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a ground stitching via within 1.0mm of each signal via. Place the ground via adjacent to the signal via on the same pad cluster.
top_issues.summary: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /I2S_LRCLK
